name: CRUD with Server Actions
description: Full CRUD implementation using Next.js server actions, Supabase RPC, and Zod validation. Follows MakerKit patterns for data fetching and mutations.

steps.name: Create Zod schema
steps.output_template: Schema file at {{schemas_path}}/{{resource_name}}.schema.ts exports Create{{ResourceName}}Schema and Update{{ResourceName}}Schema

steps.name: Create Supabase RPC functions
steps.action_template: Create database RPC functions for {{resource_name}} CRUD operations
steps.output_template: Migration file with get_{{resource_plural}}, create_{{resource_name}}, update_{{resource_name}}, delete_{{resource_name}} RPC functions

steps.name: Create loader function
steps.output_template: Loader file at {{loaders_path}}/{{resource_name}}-page.loader.ts exports load{{ResourcePlural}} function

steps.name: Create server actions
steps.action_template: Create {{resource_name}}-server-actions.ts with create, update, delete actions
steps.input_template: Zod schemas and RPC functions exist
steps.output_template: Server actions file at {{actions_path}}/{{resource_name}}-server-actions.ts using enhanceAction

steps.name: Create list component
steps.output_template: Component at {{components_path}}/{{resource_name}}-list.tsx with table or card layout

steps.name: Create form component
steps.input_template: Zod schema and server actions exist
steps.output_template: Component at {{components_path}}/{{resource_name}}-form.tsx using react-hook-form with Zod resolver

steps.name: Create page component
steps.action_template: Create page.tsx integrating list and form components
steps.output_template: Page at {{pages_path}}/page.tsx with loader data fetching and CRUD UI

steps.name: Add E2E tests
steps.action_template: Create E2E tests for {{resource_name}} CRUD operations
steps.output_template: Test file at {{tests_path}}/{{resource_name}}.spec.ts covering create, read, update, delete flows

adaptation_notes: For simple entities, steps 5-6 can be merged
